item.title: “Ultimate Dog Tease” pooch has passed away:(

item.title: If you make a nostril sound, you have to hit the green arrow thingy MEME DUMP (for people like me that want to avoid all the politics)
item.description:
1. Has anybody tried this in the MMA?
2. Who else was relieved and UNCLENCHED at the end of the video?
3. Can confirm. I've read people say that ladies actually gasped at this scene in the cinema
4. Flatearthers be like: "There's your proof that the Earth is flat"
5. Can't really think of a good captions for this one. But it's so funny to me that the seem like buddies, who are hanging out and then one day the pelican is like: "yo, i wanna eat you"
6. Welcome the party
7
8. How to win a lightsaber duel
9. DOPE
10
11. Actual footage of me having a good week and then decide to get drunk on Friday and fuck shit up
12. When a GTA NPC sees the guy who drove a tank trough Los Santos, shot thousands of cops and crashed a plane, running at them
13. Shit and shit
15. This si from my game, a saw this meme and decided to put in a level. The game is a wacky Stanley Parable-inspired passion project of mine and it would help a lot if you decided to wishlist (it's okay if you aren't going to buy it on launch and stuff like that, the support already helps us small indie devs). Please check it out here: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Hang in there, the weekend is almost here!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Riley Howell. A Good One in the Chaos
item.description: This awesome individual, Riley Howell, knocked down an active shooter in his anthropology class at University North Carolina in 2019. Although he was killed in the process, along with another student, he possibly saved more lives. He was in ROTC and wished to join the military after college. I had forgotten about him this past year. I didn't know him. He was just a news blip that faded quickly as more world chaos took his place. Something about this picture made me want to always remember him. To remember his act and sacrifice and always honor that. I looked him up and found out he was buried with full military honors and was awarded the Civilian Medal Of Honor, the highest medal awarded to non military. I'm sorry I forgot about you for awhile Riley. Toast you tonight with a little mezcal and sincere thank you. (I try to post this annually to thank him and remind people to be kind. Please downvote for every upvote as necessary)
item.dc:creator: ChicanoBatman

item.dc:creator: Nousentre

item.title: They all have it
item.description:
I just got the phone call I was dreading. Every single one of my nine foster kittens just tested positive for panleukopenia. Survival rate is less than 50/50. I lost little Purrito last night and they suspected PanLeuk so the vet said I should bring the rest of them in to get tested. And they all have it. I don’t even know what to do.
I know I’ve asked for this a lot lately, but Pico, Taquito, Queso, Chichanga, Crunchwrap Supreme, Nacho, Gordita, Frijoles, and Flan really need some good vibes. They are in a fight for their lives, literally. I’ll check on them as often as I can and update as new information comes in. This is fucking awful.
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: Come Meet Jasmne's Family!
item.description:
Had a few people ask to see the rest of Jasmne's Family so I thought I'd show a few pictures and give some introductions! (Picture of Jasmne credit to @KittensForDays :D )
This is Ender. Ender was a rescue and is about 13 years old. He loves to sleep in our bed and try to trip us while going down the stairs. He loves playing with Jasmne though.
And this handsome gentleman is Benji! Benji is about 30 years old. I got him in 1995 when a family no longer wanted him. He was roughly 3 months old at that time and been with me since. He might be old but he loves to sing!
This is Angel Food Cake! I've already posted about her but she is our little princess! She is almost extremely loved by my husband as she was his first dog since coming back to the States.
And this is Teddy Graham! Teddy came to us when a family no longer wanted him because he was chasing their 2 year old. Teddy was only 2 months old. He is 100% pure corgi but he does have floppy ears and hypothyroidism. But besides that, he is happy and well loved!
Our resident dragon is Taco Supreme. We rescued him from a pet store and have had him for 3 years. He doesn't like cuddles but he does like grubs and me terribly singing to him.
And lastly, the chickens! We have 8 chickens in total. Their names are Buffalo (rooster), BBQ, Sweet Chili, Mango, Atomic, Garlic Parm, Orange Chicken, and Jamaican Jerk. They provide our family with fresh eggs and I give them lots of veggies from my garden. That's it for now. Thanks for reading!
item.dc:creator: QuackMagicAndHerMagicalBeer

item.title: A little gross, a little vicious, yet somewhat satisfying...
item.dc:creator: LosPer

item.title: I can’t even go see them
item.description:
I’m talking with the foster coordinator, Amy, about my foster kittens. They were all diagnosed with panleukopenia this morning, which is a very contagious, very fatal disease. They have all been quarantined in the shelter and started on four different types of medication. I naively thought I could pop in and see them every day. I should have realized that the shelter would be taking every kind of precaution to prevent the spread of the disease.
But I am heartbroken. I love these babies, I named these babies. I watched them grow from teeny little creatures to kittens who use the litter box and eat dry food and rush the door when I come in and demand pets and snuggles. And I can’t be there for them. I’ve got to rely on the shelter staff to send me updates. I feel so useless.
Taquito, Chimichanga, Queso, Frijoles, Flan, Crunchwrap Supreme, Nacho and yes - even Gordita - are part of my family. I have to say, I SO appreciate all the love Imgur has shown me and my babies. What an amazing community I am apart of. So many of you are invested in me and my kittens’ story. I promise to keep you informed of every picture, video, and update that I get. My lap feels empty but my heart feels full. Thank you, Imgur.
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.dc:creator: WazertFromBlueSky

item.title: Not the update I wanted to give on Purrito
item.description:
My foster kitten Purrito passed away last night. I took him to the shelter a couple of days ago for round-the-clock care because he had stopped eating and drinking and was lethargic. I saw him yesterday and he was eating and somewhat active. We gave him a bath and here I am snuggling him afterwards. I knew there was a good chance he wasn’t going to make it, but it’s still hard to get a phone call like that. If I had known he was so close to the end, I would have brought him home. I’m devastated that he died alone.
The vet suspects panleukopenia, which is basically like parvo for cats. They asked that I bring in my nine other fosters to test for it. They have all lost weight over the past few days and most of them have bad diarrhea. We’ve tried two different medications for the diarrhea this week, but nothing has worked. I also noticed they haven’t been eating as much food, so I’ve been giving them an appetite stimulant and probiotics. But they have all been active and playful, so I am hoping we can find the right medications to fix their issues. I should be hearing from the vet in the next couple of hours, so my kittens and I could use some good vibes. I’ll update as soon as I hear back from the vet. (Here’s the devastating update: https://imgur.com/gallery/rhL3Ox0 )
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: He looks so bored with mom lol. No DNA test needed when he’s with dad.

item.title: New alarm clock has a unique feature, it has separation anxiety
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: You didn't tell me you wrote books!
item.description:
Short version of a long story - I work at a hospital (supply area) which means I get to all over the place. Bumped into a co-worker who worked with my mother back in the 90's. She's a published author who taught me how to improve my writing. The lady who runs the hospital's gift shops was surprised to know I wrote books. She ordered five of them to see how they wold sell. They sold out within two weeks. My boss bought one of my books and me to autograph it. (then she wanted me to run supplies to CCU lol) It's a small victory that has truly motivated me to keep going, and to continue improving my work.
Also, got a five star review!
item.dc:creator: ignoremeimsilly
